transport.rpc: GET or POST /api/erpc using Effect JSON serialization
transport.authentication: host-only browser session on authenticated RPCs and DELETE; OG is anonymous
transport.mutation_safety: D1 authority snapshot plus immutable request digest and resumable R2 effect receipt
transport.cache_control: RPC and mutations no-store; OG public max-age=60, stale-while-revalidate=300

operations.input: exact route with no HTTP body
operations.success: Effect RPC transport response; an empty request is a stable redacted protocol defect
operations.authorization: the selected RPC middleware owns authentication; the carrier itself discloses no tenant data

operations.input: bounded application/json Effect Request; exactly one request object
operations.success: Effect JSON Exit array preserving request ID, void/value encoding, typed failures, dies, and defects
operations.authorization: host-only session and operation-family policy after tag decoding
operations.idempotency: the Effect request ID plus operation and actor form a durable replay key; different bytes conflict

operations.input: one videoId query value and an empty body
operations.success: 204 empty only after the owner-scoped D1 tombstone and bounded paginated R2 prefix deletion
operations.authorization: required session and owner-only lookup with foreign/missing collapse
operations.idempotency: derived actor/video cleanup receipt resumes storage_pending and replays complete

operations.success: 200 image/png at 1200x630; public videos render a play card and missing/private videos render non-disclosing fallback cards
operations.authorization: anonymous read of the public bit only; private and missing storage never produce a capability

operations.input: {id,image?}; image is Effect None for removal or Some<{data base64,contentType,fileName}> for replacement
operations.success: Effect void after admin/owner authorization; replacement orders R2 put, D1 pointer swap, old managed-key delete
operations.authorization: active organization admin or owner; authorization also runs for the no-image no-op
operations.idempotency: request ID binds the exact new/old icon keys; storage_pending resumes only old-object cleanup

operations.success: Effect void only after atomic D1 tombstone and bounded paginated R2 prefix deletion
operations.authorization: session owner only with non-disclosing lookup
operations.idempotency: request ID and digest; storage_pending retries the bound prefix and complete replays void

operations.success: Effect void after metadata clone without password/shares and serial streaming R2 prefix copy
operations.idempotency: durable destination IDs and per-source-object copy receipts make interruption and concurrency converge

operations.success: Effect {id,shareUrl,upload:{type:'put',url,headers}} with exact R2 key and optional custom-domain share URL
operations.authorization: requested organization equals the actor active organization, live membership, optional in-org folder, writable R2 integration
operations.idempotency: recording rows, upload capability response, and Effect request receipt commit in one D1 batch; a losing concurrent retry replays the winner
